use_cases: Landing page hero sections with decorative visual elements
Product showcase headers featuring floating image galleries
Marketing pages requiring animated background accents
Food or restaurant website hero sections
Modern SaaS landing pages with brand-focused hero layouts
ai_summary: A hero section component featuring floating images with decorative SVG swirl backgrounds, designed for landing pages with a clean, modern aesthetic. Supports light and dark modes with subtle hover animations on floating elements. Ideal for marketing pages, product showcases, and brand-focused hero sections requiring visual depth through decorative graphics.
